title: wedelia pascalioides
intro: Wedelia pascalioides, also known as the creeping oxeye or yellow edge daisy, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Wedelia pascalioides include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
